creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to dgilbert from comment #0)

Yes, unfortunately ATM it's a know problem :( One workaround is to mount md disk with UFS2 into private/ directory, another was to skip sys-vol creation.

There is a work done by John Hixon @ iXsystems that extends provisioning to ZFS. There is a hope that his work will be incorporated into upstream or, with the permission of iXsystems we can at least include it into the port.
